info.title: PM Skills API
info.description: Read-only access to the PM Skills library — 390+ professional Agent Skills (PRDs, launch plans, board minutes, postmortems, rubrics, contracts, and more). Search skills, fetch a skill's full instructions, and browse workflow recipes.

get.description: List skills, optionally filtered by bundle or a search query.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword search over skill name and description.

parameters.name: bundle
parameters.description: Filter to one bundle/plugin (e.g. pm-business, pm-engineering).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of skills to return.

get.description: Fetch a single skill by name. Use format=md to get the raw Markdown instructions to follow.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The skill's name, e.g. prd-template or board-minutes.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Set to 'md' to return the raw Markdown instruction body instead of JSON.

200.description: The skill, as JSON or Markdown.

get.description: Keyword search across the whole library. Returns the best-matching skills.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query, e.g. 'launch plan' or 'churn'.

get.description: List the multi-skill workflow recipes (skill chains) available.
Fetch a single workflow recipe with its ordered steps.

200.description: The workflow recipe and its steps.
